creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: vg
Date: Mon Aug 19 21:25:22 2013
New Revision: 325020
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325020

Log:
  - Bump portrevision
  - USES gmake pkgconfig pathfix icon
  - Add docs
  - Trim NLS
  - Add DOCS and NLS Option
  - Add Desktop entry file
  - Add patch linux/soundcard --> sys/soundcard
  - Add Icons
  - Trim WWW
  - Trim pkg-plist, remove docs
  
  PR:		ports/181180
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch>
  Approved by:	eadler (mentor)

Added:
  head/audio/gvolwheel/files/pkg-message.in   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/audio/gvolwheel/Makefile
  head/audio/gvolwheel/files/patch-Makefile.in   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/gvolwheel/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/gvolwheel/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/audio/gvolwheel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/gvolwheel/Makefile	Mon Aug 19 20:54:39 2013	(r325019)
+++ head/audio/gvolwheel/Makefile	Mon Aug 19 21:25:22 2013	(r325020)
@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	gvolwheel
 PORTVERSION=	1.0
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}
 
@@ -15,26 +16,37 @@ BUILD_DEPENDS=	intltoolize:${PORTSDIR}/t
 
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-oss
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-USES=		pkgconfig pathfix iconv
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
+USES=		gmake iconv pathfix pkgconfig
 USE_GNOME=	gtk30
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	NLS
-NLS_DESC=	Native language support
+PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS ChangeLog README
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS NLS
+OPTIONS_SUB=	yes
 
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MNLS}
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-nls
-PLIST_SUB+=	NLS="@comment "
-.else
-PLIST_SUB+=	NLS=""
-USES+=		gettext
-.endif
+NLS_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	nls
+NLS_USES=	gettext
+
+SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
-pre-configure:
-	${ECHO} "${DOCSDIR}"
+DESKTOP_ENTRIES="GVolWheel" "${COMMENT}" "${PORTNAME}" \
+		"${PORTNAME}" "GTK;AudioVideo;Audio;Mixer;" true
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+post-patch:
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|linux/soundcard|sys/soundcard|g' \
 		${WRKSRC}/src/callbacks.c ${WRKSRC}/src/actions.c
 
+post-install:
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S|^|${WRKSRC}/|} ${DOCSDIR}
+.endif
+	${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/gvolwheel/audio-volume-high.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png
+
+	@${ECHO_CMD}
+	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+	@${ECHO_CMD}
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/audio/gvolwheel/files/patch-Makefile.in
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/gvolwheel/files/patch-Makefile.in	Mon Aug 19 20:54:39 2013	(r325019)
+++ head/audio/gvolwheel/files/patch-Makefile.in	Mon Aug 19 21:25:22 2013	(r325020)
@@ -1,11 +1,18 @@
---- Makefile.in.orig	2010-04-03 19:20:45.000000000 +0800
-+++ Makefile.in	2010-06-08 13:08:12.000000000 +0800
-@@ -268,7 +268,7 @@
+--- Makefile.in.orig	2012-04-08 00:37:17.000000000 +0200
++++ Makefile.in	2013-08-03 17:39:52.000000000 +0200
+@@ -315,14 +315,8 @@
  top_builddir = @top_builddir@
  top_srcdir = @top_srcdir@
  SUBDIRS = src po 
 -gvolwheeldocdir = ${prefix}/doc/gvolwheel
 +gvolwheeldocdir = ${prefix}/share/doc/gvolwheel
  gvolwheeldoc_DATA = \
- 	README\
- 	COPYING\
+-	README\
+-	COPYING\
+-	AUTHORS\
+-	ChangeLog\
+-	INSTALL\
+-	NEWS 
+ 
+ EXTRA_DIST = $(gvolwheeldoc_DATA) \
+ 	$(intltool_DATA)\

Added: head/audio/gvolwheel/files/pkg-message.in
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/gvolwheel/files/pkg-message.in	Mon Aug 19 21:25:22 2013	(r325020)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+===============================================================================
+
+GVolWheel has been installed.
+
+
+You could adjust which mixer you wish to use with
+
+GVolWheel / Preferences / Default mixer
+
+
+Default is used ALSA with
+
+    gnome-alsamixer
+
+
+You could use aumix with similar settings
+
+    aumix -d /dev/mixer2 -I
+
+
+===============================================================================

Modified: head/audio/gvolwheel/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/gvolwheel/pkg-descr	Mon Aug 19 20:54:39 2013	(r325019)
+++ head/audio/gvolwheel/pkg-descr	Mon Aug 19 21:25:22 2013	(r325020)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ volume. GVolWheel is application which l
 through a tray icon you can scroll on. Easily integrate with minimal
 desktops (Openbox,IceWM,XFCE etc).
 
-WWW:	http://sourceforge.net/projects/gvolwheel/
+WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/gvolwheel/

Modified: head/audio/gvolwheel/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/gvolwheel/pkg-plist	Mon Aug 19 20:54:39 2013	(r325019)
+++ head/audio/gvolwheel/pkg-plist	Mon Aug 19 21:25:22 2013	(r325020)
@@ -1,14 +1,8 @@
-%%DOCSDIR%%/AUTHORS
-%%DOCSDIR%%/COPYING
-%%DOCSDIR%%/ChangeLog
-%%DOCSDIR%%/INSTALL
-%%DOCSDIR%%/NEWS
-%%DOCSDIR%%/README
-%%NLS%%share/locale/ru/LC_MESSAGES/gvolwheel.mo
 bin/gvolwheel
+%%NLS%%share/locale/ru/LC_MESSAGES/gvolwheel.mo
+share/pixmaps/gvolwheel.png
 share/pixmaps/gvolwheel/audio-volume-high.png
 share/pixmaps/gvolwheel/audio-volume-low.png
 share/pixmaps/gvolwheel/audio-volume-medium.png
 share/pixmaps/gvolwheel/audio-volume-muted.png
-@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
 @dirrm share/pixmaps/gvolwheel
